supported_devices: Dual fans (1x intake + 1x exhaust), standard AC induction fans
port_types: 2x Schuko outlet (IN/OUT), NTC probe socket, light sensor socket
compatible_ec_fans: Not recommended; transformer output incompatible with most EC fans; designed for AC induction fans
compatible_sensors: SMSCOM NTC temperature sensor (included, 5m), light sensor (included, 1.6m cable)
recommended_use_note: Identical hardware to Hybrid Controller Mk2 but ships with light sensor included; night humidity extraction (PRO program) active out of box; silent transformer-based fan control; disabling the PRO function is possible by replacing the protective cap on the light sensor
uvp_notes: German retailer street price for 4A variant; manufacturer RRP not confirmed; 8A ~€319; 16A ~€399; uvp_amount represents 4A street price only
notes: Available in 4A (~900W), 8A, and 16A variants; same hardware as Hybrid Controller Mk2 but includes light sensor (1.6m cable) in box; night humidity extraction active automatically (fans speed up ~7 min per hour during dark period); PRO function can be disabled by replacing protective cap on light sensor; 5m NTC temp sensor included; 5-year warranty; confirmed Amazon.de ASIN B07PJT9TM8 is the 16A variant of the family listing; dimensions not separately confirmed for Pro variant
